entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The legume crop Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp.

entities.name: RAPID GENERATION ADVANCE
entities.description: The process of accelerating the turnover of generations in plant breeding to achieve faster genetic gains.

entities.name: GENETIC GAINS
entities.description: The improvement in the genetic value of a population over time through breeding.

entities.name: CULTIVARS
entities.description: Plant varieties produced in cultivation by selective breeding.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: Homozygous lines produced by repeated selfing of an F1 hybrid.

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of a plant to reach maturity in a shorter duration, facilitating faster generation turnover.

entities.name: IMMATURE SEED GERMINATION
entities.description: The technique of germinating seeds before they have fully matured on the plant to save time.

entities.name: SINGLE SEED DESCENT
entities.description: A breeding method used to rapidly advance generations of self-pollinating crops by selecting a single seed from each plant.

entities.name: GENOMICS RESEARCH
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism, requiring rapid development of genetic materials.
